# Santiago Fernández · santifer
> AI Product Engineer building production agents with agentic RAG, LLMOps observability, evals as CI gate, and a self-healing closed loop.

## Pages
- [Home (ES)](/es): Interactive CV in Spanish
- [Home (EN)](/en): Interactive CV in English

## Sections
- About: Background and approach to AI product engineering
- Experience: Roles and achievements
- Projects: Featured production systems
- Stack: Technical skills (Claude, RAG, pgvector, Langfuse, Supabase, n8n, etc.)
- Architecture: Chatbot pipeline diagram with cost per span
- Cases: Self-Healing Chatbot, Career-Ops, Programmatic SEO
